creator: freebsd@mosedal.net
text:
Created attachment 201552
Patch to update port to version 5.22.0

Hi,
I have attached a patch that should update the port to version 5.22.0.
This is the latest version at the time of writing this bug report.
As well as updating the port to the latest version, it also fixes bug #235313 - by disabling the build of shared libraries which fixes running osrm-extract.
I realize this is not the perfect fix, but it gets the port working.

If I can do anything to help, please let me know.

All the best,

Peter.
